reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming out! We can't wait to see you again
reviews_data.review_text: Nice people, yummy drinks.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Awesome! Thanks for coming in and we can't wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: Cool little spot with a good menu of drink options. Sam was super friendly and walked us through all of our questions about kava without judgement. If you're curious, give it a look!

This place is such a great spot. Really cozy, good music, good people, and just an easy place to be. I also want to give a shoutout to Sam — he is genuinely awesome and makes the place feel welcoming.

I had the green and white kratom mix and ended up having a super productive work session. Definitely one of those places you enjoy right away and want to come back to.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Yay! Thank you for visiting and we'll see you next time
reviews_data.review_text: Lovely spot! Super cute, welcoming and community oriented. I love the space - so glad we stopped by!

reviews_data.owner_answer: It was so much fun so much fun.That we are doing it again in april on the twenty sixth.We can't wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: I went here for goat yoga a couple weeks ago and it was absolutely amazing! I tried a Kava beverage and my boyfriend tried a kratom one, the flavor is a little different but we enjoyed them very much!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in!!
reviews_data.review_text: Friendly staff excellent product

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Sarah,  we loved having you today!!
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely love the atmosphere. Bambi was very helpful. All natural product! Thank you.  I will be back

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!
Thank you! We can't wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text:
Friendly and knowledgeable staff. Great selection. Atmosphere is wonderful! Love it here.

Check out their special events!!!! Karaoke, trivia, murder mystery!!!! So much interactive fun. And they have an amazing little selection of local artisans right inside the shop! Great little gem 💎

reviews_data.review_text: Such a great little location in the downtown Lowell area. The owners are super kind, and the service is superb. I’m new to the Kava scene, but I must say I really enjoyed a number of drinks they serve. There’s also coffee for the coffee lovers as well- like myself. Such a very cool spot. You should definitely check it out!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for stopping by!
reviews_data.review_text: What a great kava bar. The drinks were good the vibes were awesome!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in. We can't wait to see you regularly.
reviews_data.review_text: Lovely place. Friendly owner Sam was great to talk to and was really helpful. even gave me some free stickers. I would recommend this place.

reviews_data.owner_answer: You are most welcome!!

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text:
This place and the people here are absolutely amazing. Im not very good at being social and get overwhelmed very easily, but the two times I’ve been here have been great.
The owners Bambe and Sam are some of the most kind and accepting people I’ve met. Not many places in the area are as comfy and welcoming as here.
If you are ever out in the area I highly recommend stopping by and trying the Black label Kava.

Thank you so much for being open and caring towards anyone who walks in the door. 🏳️‍⚧️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Awesome!! Thank you for coming in!!
reviews_data.review_text: Great first time experience! Owner welcomed me immediately with great and warm care. 10/10 would recommended for a relaxing experience. Aroma and vibe was sensational and unique.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Alice!! Can't wait for you to come in again!!
reviews_data.review_text:
Honestly, any words I say here can't do this place justice with how welcoming it is and the overall quality of the kratom and kava I got there as well as how knowledgeable Sam is with the stuff and guiding me on how to use it as a first timer with the stuff. No alcohol is allowed on the premise and this place made someone who gets nervous easily in new places comfortable and social with everyone there.
They also offer local art and products like soap and mysticism stuff which is my in my own personal interest too

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww thank you!!
reviews_data.review_text: Drove 45 minutes to come here and I would drive twice that to do it again! Wonderfully charismatic and knowledgeable owner/staff with premium grade kava and kratom. Great place to go for your first kava/ kratom experience or equally as great if you're already an avid user/afficionado. Can't say enough good things about this place.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in!! Thanks for the great conversation!
reviews_data.review_text: A really refreshing place to meet nice people and have great conversation. Will be back soon!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting!!!
reviews_data.review_text: Very cool atmosphere and vibe here. The perfect place to hang for a while, and a safe space for people of all types!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in.
reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic kava bar featuring a diverse menu and great owners who made the experience even better!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for coming by!!
reviews_data.review_text: A very comfy cosy place with great staff, amazing drinks, and super fun events. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in!!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing and pleasant place. Owner is very knowledgeable and friendly. I enjoyed my experience there and the drinks were amazing!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming out!!
reviews_data.review_text: Cool little spot with genuinely nice owners. The kava was smooth and well made.

reviews_data.owner_answer: It was great meeting you!! We can't wait to see you again!!
reviews_data.review_text: What an amazing place! We had no idea what we were walking into, wanted to try a Kava place after hearing about it from friends, the Kava is delicious and relaxing (I had 3) but what makes this place really special is the people. The owners, the activites (check their website for music trivia, karaoke). This is a great contrast to today's modern world of bars where no one interacts with each other, and everyone just gets tipsy and then leaves. This is a special place where humans interact with other humans. Wish I didn't live an hour away, but I'll still be back <3

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing!!
reviews_data.review_text: This is something anyone that needs to relive stress, pain and so much more. Fantastic service and expertise on everything!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Stop in on your next visit here!!
reviews_data.review_text: Sam was absolutely amazing, a wealth of knowledge and great conversation,not to mention the best kava I've ever had. If I didn't live in Alaska I would stop by every week. Great place to bring someone to to introduce them properly to kava and kratom

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww thank you!!
reviews_data.review_text:
This place is special!! Sam is so knowledgeable and welcoming.
The space has the most chill ambiance and radiates good energy.

Open mic nights! Music Bingo!?!  What's not to love?

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!!
reviews_data.review_text: Great atmosphere and coffee 🫶

reviews_data.owner_answer: Awesome thank you!!
reviews_data.review_text: Stopped in for my first ever Kratom Mocktail! Sam was a gracious host! He took time to educate me and explain everything I needed to know. The atmosphere, conversation and service was Awesome! I will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww thank you for the great review! Hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I love Lowell's little Kava shop. The owners are Awesome!!!! I'll say it again, the owners are Awesome!!! This is not a smoke shop. This is a kava bar that is run by two very informed and educated owners. They can speak in detail about every product they offer. They have music, chess tournaments, and promote local artists. They serve a variety of kava mocktails. I highly recommend trying the Black Label Kava. They have kratom as well. They have done a great job of sourcing high quality ingredients. Give them a try if you're over 18.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in!
reviews_data.review_text: Great people here and the and the non-alcoholic drinks are awesome too!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping in, and we hope to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: Just happened upon North Main Kava Bar and lucky we did. Great feeling here. Very welcoming with friendly staff and patrons. Wish we lived closer for regular drop ins.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Greg! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Very educated and friendly owners.  If you want a true experience with these products go to where they specialize in it!  They most definitely are!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww we are so happy you found us! Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: They have real noble kava kava root tea. A place worth checking out!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww thank you! We will miss you!
reviews_data.review_text: Our family loves this Kava Bar in Lowell.  The owners have curated a great vibe and welcoming atmosphere. Can't say enough good things about it. Check it out!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks!¡
reviews_data.review_text: Wow! Come get your kava!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Mike! We love when new people come in and check us out!
reviews_data.review_text: Just spent a couple of hours for the live music and tasteful drinks. Place has a cool vibe, the owners are friendly and seems like everyone is welcoming. A nice, mellow place to chill.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! It was great to meet you, abs we can't wait to see you next time you're in town!!
reviews_data.review_text:
Was looking for a kava place around Charlotte. This was the closest location nearby a big city. The people of Lowell are lucky to have this in their small town.
The owners, Bambe and Sam are awesome!

Also, North Main Kava held a music bingo event which was truly a lot of fun.

If you are someone who enjoys a good time without the booze , I highly recommended North Main Kava. You are also helping support a small business and keeping your entertainment dollars local.

Best of luck to Bambe and Sam!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww it was so nice meeting you and your husband. We look forward to seeing you weekly!!
reviews_data.review_text:
I join the folks at...
North Main Kava Bar for and evening of Music Bingo Thursday @7pm. What a great time I had. Bambe DeWitt introduced herself and help made the experience very comfortable for a new comer here in Gastonia. There were great free prizes to win.  A good crowd. Lots of laugh and fun in a alcohol free enviroment. If you want some place to go on a Thursday night come on out and join the intimate setting of the North Main Kava Bar.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you
reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite Kava bars and is quickly becoming my second home. I've been coming here every Friday to pull out my laptop, get some work done, and to just relax and chill! The owners are incredibly nice and the atmosphere is great. I am super glad there's a kava bar near Charlotte! This kava bar is also only 20 minutes from the Charlotte Airport, which is great for any travelers who want to feel relaxed during a layover or after coming back from a trip!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aww, we love having you Kara!!
reviews_data.review_text: a small, family-owned business with great kava/kratom and great customer service.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Thursday night music bingo is a lot of fun for all.
reviews_data.review_text: Great little social spot. The owners are so kind. Thursday night music bingo is great fun!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Gavin, we always enjoy having you!
reviews_data.review_text: It's always a great atmosphere. The owners are amazing. Informative and awesome conversationalist, always something to talk about!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you,  can't wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: Came in with a friend and made new friends. The owners  are amazing and so knowledgeable. Great service! Thank you all again.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!!
reviews_data.review_text: Best kava bar around ! Love coming here!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!!!
reviews_data.review_text: Sam and Bambie are super nice and very informative. They both make you feel very welcome. My husband and I love hanging out at this place, AND they are starting music bingo every Thursday night at 7pm!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for being a great person!!
reviews_data.review_text: Bambi and Sam are the most generous and kind folks I've met. These are the people that make the community so welcoming. The kava and kratom they serve are clean and excellent tasting. I will always visit this bar when in town. Thank you Sam and Bambi for all of the great talks and heart touching service, wishing your business so much success and growth!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting!!
reviews_data.review_text: Excellent kava kratom drinks are tasty and unique, came to visit NC for a few days and been here every single day. The owners are amazing kind hearted individuals and they make their kava fresh in small batches. If your in the Charlotte area this is a must to visit!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting!
reviews_data.review_text: Definitely worth checking out !! Great place !!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you liked it!!
reviews_data.review_text: Had a great time here today! This was the first time I’ve tried kava, and I was pleasantly surprised! The kava was very relaxing, and the owners were so nice. I will definitely be back again!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for stopping in Brad! It was nice meeting you!
reviews_data.review_text: Was in town from California and was hoping to find kava, and I found this little gem! The owners were kind and definitely going to stop by again.

reviews_data.review_text: Was in town from California and was hoping to find kava, and I found this little gem! The owners were kind and definitely going to stop by again.

raw_data.typical_time_spent: People typically spend 15 min to 3.5 hr here
